description: Fixture-only workflow query suite for codex-memory VCP Memory Core acceptance. Cases are sanitized and do not call providers or mutate data.

cases.query: How can I inspect audit logs and recall health for Codex memory?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document memory_overview

cases.query: What happens if the side index write fails after the diary entry is already saved?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document dual_write_shadow

cases.query: Which component reuses ranked retrieval candidates until the knowledge base changes?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document candidate_cache

cases.query: How does retrieval inject recent conversation state into the query embedding?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document context_vector

cases.query: Which providers have dedicated reranking request formats in this project?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document rerank_providers; no provider call is made

cases.query: Which remote services are supported for real embedding generation?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document embedding_providers; no provider call is made

cases.query: What adds notebook-level semantic bias during candidate generation?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document diary_vectors

cases.query: Which command checks remote provider connectivity and prints a report?
cases.notes: fixture-only query derived from sanitized benchmark document provider_smoke; no provider call is made
